    Draws a clock visualization at the specified location using particle effects.
    drawClocklines(Location, double, World, int, Particle, Particle.DustOptions, double) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Draws clock-like lines radiating outward from a central point on a circular plane.
    drawDangerSymbol(Location, double, int, Particle, Particle.DustOptions, Particle.DustOptions) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Draws a danger symbol composed of an exclamation point and an enclosing isosceles triangle.

    Drawing an Elipse using Particles
    drawExclamationPoint(Location, double, int, Particle, Particle.DustOptions, Location) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Draws an exclamation point at the specified location using particles.
    drawEye(Location, int) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Drawing an Eye using Particles
    drawHeart(Location, double, World, int, Particle, Particle.DustOptions) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Draws a heart shape in the world using the specified particle effect.
    drawIsoscelesTriangle(Location, double, World, int, Particle, Particle.DustOptions) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Draws an isosceles triangle using particles in the specified world.
    drawIsoscelesTriangle(Location, double, World, int, Particle, Particle.DustOptions, Location) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Draws an isosceles triangle in the given world using particles, based on the specified parameters.
    drawLine(Location, Location, World, int, Particle) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Draws a line between two locations in the specified world using particles.
    drawLine(Location, Location, World, int, Particle, int, int, int, int, Color) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Draws a line between two locations in a specified world using particles.
    drawLine(Location, Location, World, int, Particle, Particle.DustOptions) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Draws a line in the world by spawning particles between two given locations.
    drawParticleLine(Location, Location, World, Particle, Particle.DustOptions, double, double, double) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Draws a line of particles between two locations in the specified world.
    drawPlayerTintedDisplay(boolean, double, Player, int, ItemStack, Location, Color, int, double) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Draws a tinted display around the player with animations and optional teleportation.
    drawSphere(Location, double, int, Particle, Particle.DustOptions) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Draws a sphere by spawning particles at locations calculated around the given center point.
    drawSpiral(Location, double, int, World, int, Particle, Particle.DustOptions) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Draws a spiral originating from a specified center location in the given world.
    drawSquare(Location, double, double, Particle, Particle.DustOptions, double, double, double) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Draws a square shape using particles at a specified location, with configurable size, rotation, particle type, and dust options.
    drawStar(Location, double, World, int, Particle, Particle.DustOptions) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Draws a star-shaped pattern in the world using particles.
    drawTintedDisplay(double, Location, int, ItemStack, Location, Color, int) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Creates and manages a tinted item display entity that transitions between two locations over a configurable duration, with scaling and timing options.
    drawverticleCircle(Location, double, World, int, Particle, Particle.DustOptions) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Draws a vertical circle in the specified world using particles.
    drawVerticleSquare(Location, double, double, Particle, Particle.DustOptions, double, double, double) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Draws a verticle square shape using particles at a specified location, with configurable size, rotation, particle type, and dust options.
    drawVerticleSquare(Location, double, double, Particle, Particle.DustOptions, double, double, double, boolean, double) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Draws a vertical square using particles in a 3D space, with options for size, rotation, and positional limits.
